title: Anti-Surveillance Toolkit (7-Layer Privacy Guide)
content:
Comprehensive privacy infrastructure guide for 2026.

7 layers:
1. Hardware: Purism laptop, GrapheneOS phone, YubiKey
2. Network: ProtonVPN, Pi-hole, Tor, firewall
3. Communications: Signal, ProtonMail, PGP, SimpleX
4. Data: Veracrypt, Cryptomator, BleachBit, metadata hygiene
5. Behavior: Compartmentalization, opsec, social engineering defense
6. Legal: Know your rights, gag order workaround, journalism shields
7. Community: Mesh networks, offline comms, mutual aid

Cost: $0 (all open-source). No subscriptions, no paid services.

Status: 854-line guide written. Zero-cost implementation.
